Tian Xu з”°зәҢ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Xu (з”°зәҢ). Slew Deng Ai and his son in revenge for Deng Ai nearly executing him. Tian Xu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
